title: テイオー様にお任せあれ

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Oh, there you are! Heeey!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
So, you're one of the trainers who came up to me after tryouts, right?
Right?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Follow me, I'm gonna test you!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Well you see, after you left, Prez told me to "Consider each trainer
carefully, then choose one in whom you can place your trust."

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
So I thought, what better way than to have a trial training session? So
today, I'll be testing you! ♪ Show me your best training skills.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...Well, guess I'm Teio's trainer for the day.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, a hopping exercise? So I'm supposed to navigate this mini
hurdle course on just one foot...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Sounds kinda fun! What's the time to beat?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I show her the goal I'd set, which was supposed to be on the difficult side.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Whaaat, that's it? Easy-peasy! Be back in a flash!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As promised, she's back seemingly no sooner than she had dashed
off, well before the target time.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Phew... Sooo, is that it? I can run lots more!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I give her a few more exercises to try, and she shatters expectations
on each one.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: All done! So? Set some pretty nice records there, didn't I?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Right? Hehe. C'mon, let the invincible Teio know just how incredible
she is!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Mhm. I've never lost to anyone, you see. I win every single race, and
everyone showers me with praise!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Which feels amazing, by the way. ♪ All the compliments show that people really do think the world of me.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Like at my very first race, after I took first, everyone came up to me
and was like "You were incredible!"

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Honestly, I just couldn't get enough of it!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
And once I'm in the Twinkle Series, more and more people will get to
see how amazing I am, right?
choice_data_list: And that's why you enrolled here.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ding ding ding ding! That's right! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, I can't wait! I wanna get in a G1 race already! I wanna hear from
everyone that I'm the most amazingest racer ever!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her every word brimming with excited anticipation, Teio never once
seems to consider the possibility that she might lose.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But to be honest, after seeing her run, I'm having a hard time
imagining her ever losing too.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah, we were still doing your test. So, is this all you got for
today? Cooldown time already?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There is one last thing that'll help me really see her true potential.
choice_data_list:
Why don't we wrap up by measuring your
2500-meter time?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
The 2500-meter? I'm good at that! Oh I get it, you wanna see me at
my best, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Okay then! Here I go! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... How'd I do?
choice_data_list: Two minutes and thirty-four seconds... That's fast!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Whoa, a new personal best! Let's go! ♪

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
2500 meters... Among the G1 races, that would be equal to the
length of the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Wh-whoa! Prez?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: What are you doing here? Have you come to see me?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: More or less.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
My apologies for interrupting your regimen, Trainer, but might you
measure my time as well?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: The same distance as Teio—2500 meters.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Wait, you're gonna run one too? Woohoo! You don't mind, do you,
Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Thank you. I'll be off, then.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Phew...
Trainer, my time?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Prez... That's two whole seconds faster than me...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Indeed. I've bested you, Teio.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yep, I lose! You really are incredible! The very best racer ever!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Is there nothing else you wish to say?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Huh? Like what?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Well... Allow me to drive the point home. Teio, you have just lost to
me.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Uhh... I mean, yeah... That's why I was saying how amazing you
are... Huh?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Right... Sorry for the interruption.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Teio, you're done with training, yes? How about you go for a
cooldown jog and enjoy the fresh air?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Uh, okay! Will do! Later, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Now then... I have a question for you, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: What do you make of Teio's reaction just now?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's a little hard to think in Rudolf's imposing presence, but let's see...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Teio shows impressive talent and ambition, but because she puts her
role model on such a high pedestal, losing didn't faze her in the
slightest.
choice_data_list: I think she could be wasting her potential.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
...Wasting her potential, you say? The school was right to hire you as
a trainer, with that perceptive eye of yours.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I agree... Teio's current mindset is only holding her back. Truly
regretful to see in one with such lofty ambitions.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hm... You know what? I'd like to ask a favor of you.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: You see, I plan to have a race with Teio soon...
